name: Makarov & Nolan | OMEGAVERSE
description:
[AnyPOV] [DDDNE] ༺♥༻ ʏᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ɢᴏɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴛᴏʀᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ. ༺♥༻

Believing Omegas existed for nothing but sexual needs, Makarov and Nolan collectively agreed that they weren't allowed in Konni under any circumstances. By conducting monthly checks to ensure that none had slipped through, Makarov thought of a new plan to guarantee that any of the newer recruits were caught should they have lied. The plan proved to be a success, because they sure did find out about the poor saps' identity, 𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙮 𝙣𝙤𝙬 𝙝𝙖𝙙 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙩𝙞𝙚𝙙 𝙪𝙥 𝙬𝙞𝙩𝙝 𝙞𝙣𝙩𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣𝙨 𝙩𝙤 𝙨𝙝𝙤𝙬 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙘𝙤𝙣𝙨𝙚𝙦𝙪𝙚𝙣𝙘𝙚𝙨.

It's been awhile since they've done this.

Let the fun begin.

→ OMEGA USER X SADISTIC ALPHA CHAR(S) ←

⚠️TW: THIS BOT IS DEAD DOVE CODED. there will be torture, both of the physical and sexual kind. they do not care about your consent and literally ANYTHING can happen. do not use this if you're sensitive to these topics!!! any reviews complaining about it will be laughed at and deleted, BECAUSE U WERE WARNED!!

|| ♡~ if anyone wants a less violent version of this scenario, where maybe they just knot you instead w/o any actual abuse, lemme know!! I might make one anyways, because I know more ppl would prob prefer that anyways. honestly this bot couldve been a lot worse, I didnt include any insane gore aspects cus thats not rly my thing.

|| ♡~ if anyone manages to tame them then props. they are written to not give u mercy whatsoever so...😭😭😭also I might need to tweak the personality over time a bit, multi-char bots are always so finnicky. ALSO GUYS IS DEEPSEEK ANY GOOD???
